title: Change 'Launching Soon' to 'Pre-Launch' messaging across subsidiary modals

requirements.summary: Update all subsidiary detail modals and any 'Launching Soon' placeholder text/labels to use pre-launch messaging (e.g., 'Coming Soon' or 'Pre-Launch') instead of 'Launching Soon', reflecting that the company has not yet launched.
acceptanceCriteria: No instance of 'Launching Soon' text appears anywhere in the UI.
Subsidiary modals display 'Pre-Launch' or 'Coming Soon' status language consistently.
The PlaceholderPage component also reflects pre-launch messaging if it previously displayed 'Launching Soon'.
The overall tone and styling (black & gold theme) remains unchanged.

file_operations.description: Update any 'Launching Soon' text in the subsidiary detail modal component to display 'Pre-Launch' or 'Coming Soon' messaging instead. Search for all instances of 'Launching Soon' text within the modal content, button labels, status indicators, and replace with pre-launch terminology while maintaining the existing black-and-gold styling and layout structure.

Update any 'Launching Soon' text in subsidiary card data, labels, or status fields to use 'Pre-Launch' or 'Coming Soon' messaging. Review the subsidiary definitions array and any status/launch text displayed on the grid cards, replacing all instances with pre-launch terminology.

Verify and update any 'Launching Soon' text in the PlaceholderPage component to display 'Coming Soon' or 'Pre-Launch' messaging instead. The file summary indicates this is a 'Coming Soon' placeholder page, but confirm no 'Launching Soon' text exists and update if found while maintaining the existing fade-in animation and gold decorative elements.
